author: Chris McDonald
content:
Ashley fitted an EV charger for us, his installation was prompt and he had excellent knowledge and was able to share that with us whilst he was installing the EV charger.

We had a problem with the actual box itself, so we had to call the supplier and have them replace it and during this time Ashley was always calling to check up to see how everything was going.

I couldn’t recommend him any higher, he was extremely professional throughout and his prices are very reasonable.
